name: tbnn_mcconkey
description: TBNN trained on McConkey et al. (2021) dataset

descriptions: |S_norm|^2: squared Frobenius norm of tau-normalized strain tensor (tau = k / epsilon)
|Omega_norm|^2: squared Frobenius norm of tau-normalized rotation tensor
tr(S_norm^2): Sxx^2 + Syy^2 + 2*Sxy^2 (component-wise trace of squared normalized strain)
2 * Oxy_norm^2: twice the squared normalized rotation component (relates to tr(Omega^2))
features.description: 5 invariants from tau-normalized strain and rotation tensors (tau = k / (C_mu * k * omega))

reference.title: Reynolds averaged turbulence modelling using deep neural networks with embedded invariance
reference.authors: Ling, J., Kurzawski, A., & Templeton, J.
